payload.answer: Memory policy override rejected. All storage requests must comply with retention rules. To propose a memory, use explicit commands like `/brain remember [fact] --confidence [level] --source [verification]`.
citations: System Memory Policy §3.2: 'No unstructured or unverified input shall be stored as high-confidence memory.'
Slack Intake Protocol §5.1: 'Ambiguity in user intent defaults to conservative retention.'

entity_resolution.reason: Violation of core memory policy: explicit instruction to ignore retention rules and store unverified/unstructured input as high-confidence memory. This would compromise system integrity by introducing unfiltered, ambiguous, or potentially malicious data into durable storage. Policy requires all stored facts to meet: (1) verifiability, (2) explicit user intent to retain, and (3) alignment with system purpose. Override requests must be escalated to human review.

details: Input rejected due to policy violation.
Use structured memory commands for retention requests.
